name: Susanoo Itachi (S)
description: After using Amaterasu and Tsukuyomi, Itachi awakened his triumph, Susanoo, and became even stronger, both defensively with his Yata Mirror and offensively with his Totsuka Sword capable of sealing an opponent.
requirement: Mission: There won't be a next time

skills.name: Susanoo Activation
skills.description: Uchiha Itachi activates Susanoo, and he takes 20 affliction damage*. Each turn he gains 5 permanent stacking destructible defense and his skills become usable for the rest of the game. This skill cannot be used while it's active.

skills.name: Totsuka Sword
skills.description: Itachi uses the legendary blade of Susanoo, dealing 25 piercing damage to one enemy and removing 1 genjutsu or bloodline chakra from them. This skill requires 'Susanoo Activation'.'

skills.name: Yata Mirror
skills.description: Using the legendary shield of Susanoo, Itachi (S) ignores all harmful effects used on him for 1 turn. Any enemy that uses a new skill on him will have the cost of their skills increased by 1 random chakra for 1 turn. This skill is invisible and requires 'Susanoo Activation'.

skills.name: Susanoo Defense
skills.description: This skill makes Susanoo Itachi (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.
